channel.title: Glibc on bitfriends' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Glibc on bitfriends' blog

item.title: chains - BRICS CTF 2024
item.description:
Two weeks ago, I played BRICS CTF with r3kapig, and we ranked 1st! Chains was one of the challanges I solved.

We were given a program to add/remove proxies and chains. Upon executing we’re presented with:

1. Add Proxy
2. Delete Proxy
3. Add Chain
4. View Chain
5. Delete Chain
6. Exit

That resembles a typical heap challenge. It turns out to be one, since the following structures are getting allocated dynamically:

item.title: Software and hardware fundamentals
item.description: Note that this is only an early reference that I initially created for mysELF. I decided to publish it for those, who want to have an overview of the fundamentals. If you spot any mistakes or if you think something should be added, please reach me on Discord (bitfriends). I used some pictures from other people because this was only a reference for me. The people who created the pictures are amazing and should feel honored :)
